Meanwhile, Damon received the cascade of notifications with a satisfied smile already tugging at the corner of his lips.

He was lying back on his own bed, arms folded loosely behind his head, the dim candlelight casting warm shadows across his sharp, handsome features.

His luminous golden eyes drifted slowly toward the wall that separated his quarters from Selene’s room, as though his gaze could pierce straight through the wall and see exactly what was happen on the other side.

’It seems my little plan is already bearing fruit,’ he thought, the smile deepening with quiet amusement.

’Let’s see how the proud Elder carries herself tomorrow morning.’

He held that thought for a moment longer, savoring it, before his attention shifted to the flood of other notifications blinking at the front of his eyes.

There were quite a few of them, as usual — a familiar torrent of system messages clamoring for his focus all at once.

He skimmed over them with ease because he already become long accustomed to the System’s habit of giving the notification right after he done having sex.

He dismissed the bulk of the notifications with a casual thought and opened his status instead.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - First Level]

[True Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Ninth Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 65, Water: 65, Ice: 65, Wind: 65, Earth: 65, Lightning: 315, Nature: 65, Light: 65, Dark: 65, Sword: 100] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Heaven Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 824,100]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria, Mio Nightrider, Mia Nightrider]

[Beasts Bonds: Neko [Heavenly White Tiger]]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes, Polymorph]

Seeing the added 400,000 lust points brought him to a brief pause.

’That is quite a lot,’ he mused inwardly, leaning back against the warm softness of the bed.

’The most of it almost certainly came from Neko and Selene. Neko’s unknown cultivation alone must have generated a considerable amount, and Selene...’ He let the thought trail off with a faint smirk tugging at the corner of his lips.

’Well. A woman like that does not crack easily, but when she does, the points reflect it accordingly.’

’As for the rest, that would be Ariel.’

His gaze drifted momentarily toward the sleeping young woman beside him, taking in the quiet rise and fall of her chest, the dark blue of her hair splayed like ink across the pillow.

He exhaled slowly, then directed his thoughts inward. ’System, show me my current cultivation techniques.’

[Yin-Yang Harem Scripture]

[Description: A dual cultivation technique that teaches you how to dual cultivate. A special technique that will grow stronger the more partner users have.]

[Earth Grade Technique - Peak(automatically upgraded when more woman learn it)]

[Astral Steps]

[Description: The Astral Steps is a Long Lost Movement Technique, and it consists of eight levels of movement techniques, each stronger and faster than the next. Each grade will unlock the next level.]

[Heaven Grade Technique (can be upgraded)]

[Heavenly Tribulation Lightning Art]

[Description: A special technique that allows the user to control and generate the Heavenly Tribulation Lightning. The legends say that it was created in an accident where nine Heavenly Tribulation Lightnings descended to punish a newly born elemental god.]

[Heaven Grade Technique (can be upgraded)]

[Eternal Darkness’s Broken Shadow Art]

[Description: A special technique that allows the user to conceal their aura to an extreme degree. This also allows the user to disappear from the others’ senses completely.]

[Heaven Grade Technique (can be upgraded)]

’Hmm... what should I buy? Ariel can just cultivate using my yang qi as long I fill her up. Should I buy more cultivation technique or should I save up first?’

While he thinking about it a new notification appear.
